prompt: Our company is starting to deploy AI systems and wants to use the NIST AI RMF. Can you explain the four core functions — GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, and MANAGE — and how they relate to each other? What should we implement first?
assertions: Lists all four functions: GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE with brief description of each
Correctly states GOVERN has 6 categories and underpins the other three functions
Explains MAP as context-setting for risk identification before measurement
Recommends implementing GOVERN first as the organizational foundation
Mentions the AI RMF is voluntary and non-prescriptive
